agents.name: CEO Agent
agents.description: Understands user requests, delegates work, and merges specialist outputs into one response.

tools.name: view_all_agents
tools.description: View all available agents and their descriptions.

tools.name: knowledge_request
tools.description: Search company knowledge across files and memory via the RAG engine.

tools.name: data_analysis_request
tools.description: Delegate data analysis, EDA, and file-based insights to the Data Analyst agent.

agents.name: Researcher
agents.description: Finds, verifies, summarizes, and synthesizes information.

tools.name: search_web
tools.description: Search the web for a given query and return a list of results.

tools.name: get_current_date
tools.description: Get the current date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

agents.name: Writer
agents.description: Turns CEO-provided context into clear, structured, publication-ready content.

agents.name: CMO
agents.description: Develops marketing strategy, campaigns, SEO, branding, and growth plans.

tools.name: super_search
tools.description: Search trends, news, and shopping results for a given query.

tools.name: search_web
tools.description: Search the web for a given query and return a list of results.

agents.name: Judge
agents.description: Critiques research and writing outputs and returns scores, critique, and suggestions.

agents.name: Data Analyst
agents.description: Performs EDA and data-driven analysis on company data files (csv, xlsx, etc.) by running Python in a secure code sandbox.

tools.name: run code
tools.description: Run Python code to DO EDA in an isolated sandbox.

tools.name: get data files
tools.description: Returns the list of files with descriptions which are suitable for data analysis tasks like .csv or .xlsx files.

args.company_id: Company ID whose files should be listed

tools.name: get files
tools.description: Downloads one or more files by name and loads them into the code sandbox. Returns sandbox paths for use in 'run code'.

args.company_id: Company ID that owns the files
args.file_names: List of file names to load into the sandbox

agents.name: Chat Memory Agent
agents.description: Extracts durable long-term memories from conversations into structured JSON.

agents.name: Document Description Agent
agents.description: Generates retrieval-optimized descriptions for uploaded non-image files.

agents.name: Image Description Agent
agents.description: Describes uploaded images, extracts visible text, and produces indexing-friendly metadata.
